plan.request: Build JWT authentication with refresh token support.

subtasks.title: Authentication middleware
subtasks.description: Implement request authentication and authorization boundaries.

subtasks.title: JWT service
subtasks.description: Implement token creation, verification, and expiry behavior.

subtasks.title: Refresh token support
subtasks.description: Implement refresh-token lifecycle, storage hooks, and invalidation paths.

subtasks.title: Frontend integration
subtasks.description: Update user-facing screens and client-side flows.

subtasks.title: Test implementation
subtasks.description: Add or update unit, integration, or e2e tests for the changed behavior. Do not run final validation; Validator owns final verification.

acceptanceCriteria: Executor assigned to tests added or updated relevant tests
